title: F.T.C. Sues to Stop Blockbuster Chip Deal Between Nvidia and Arm
content: The proposed deal would give Nvidia control over computing technology and designs that rival firms rely on.

more_info.byline: By Cecilia Kang and Don Clark

en_title: F.T.C. Sues to Stop Blockbuster Chip Deal Between Nvidia and Arm
en_content: The proposed deal would give Nvidia control over computing technology and designs that rival firms rely on.

title: A Car a Minute Used to Flow Through Here, but Chaos Now Reigns
content: A shipping terminal in Kansas reveals the fundamental problem — no one can plan, and no one is sure what will happen next.
en_title: A Car a Minute Used to Flow Through Here, but Chaos Now Reigns
en_content: A shipping terminal in Kansas reveals the fundamental problem — no one can plan, and no one is sure what will happen next.

title: Didi Moves to Leave U.S. Stock Market Just Months After Huge Offering
content: The ride-hailing giant made an abrupt shift as officials in Washington and Beijing have grown increasingly skeptical of Chinese corporate access to Wall Street’s money.
en_title: Didi Moves to Leave U.S. Stock Market Just Months After Huge Offering
en_content: The ride-hailing giant made an abrupt shift as officials in Washington and Beijing have grown increasingly skeptical of Chinese corporate access to Wall Street’s money.

title: A Journalist, a Philosophy Major and the Mad Scramble for Video Game Consoles
content: New gaming consoles remain in short supply this holiday season, spawning cottage industries of tipsters and scalpers making money off their scarcity.

more_info.byline: By Kellen Browning and Julie Creswell

en_title: A Journalist, a Philosophy Major and the Mad Scramble for Video Game Consoles
en_content: New gaming consoles remain in short supply this holiday season, spawning cottage industries of tipsters and scalpers making money off their scarcity.

title: Omicron Could Knock a Fragile Economic Recovery Off Track
content: The latest zigzag in the pandemic has already curtailed travel, but its broader impact on growth and inflation isn’t likely to be known for several weeks.
en_title: Omicron Could Knock a Fragile Economic Recovery Off Track
en_content: The latest zigzag in the pandemic has already curtailed travel, but its broader impact on growth and inflation isn’t likely to be known for several weeks.

title: Britain Turns to Bankers to Blaze a Green Trail
content: The financial industry will be relied on to meet climate goals. NatWest, a lender to oil giants, provides a template.

des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: Britain Turns to Bankers to Blaze a Green Trail
en_content: The financial industry will be relied on to meet climate goals. NatWest, a lender to oil giants, provides a template.

title: CNN and Chris Cuomo Face Difficult Questions After Anchor’s Suspension
content: The network said it was pursuing a “further evaluation” of evidence regarding its star anchor’s efforts to help stave off a sexual harassment scandal that his brother, former Gov. Andrew M. Cuomo, was facing.

more_info.byline: By Michael M. Grynbaum and John Koblin

en_title: CNN and Chris Cuomo Face Difficult Questions After Anchor’s Suspension
en_content: The network said it was pursuing a “further evaluation” of evidence regarding its star anchor’s efforts to help stave off a sexual harassment scandal that his brother, former Gov. Andrew M. Cuomo, was facing.

title: Biden and Trump S.E.C. Chiefs Trade Tips on How to Regulate Crypto
content: Gary Gensler and Jay Clayton are aligned on at least one thing: Many types of crypto tokens fall in the agency’s domain.
en_title: Biden and Trump S.E.C. Chiefs Trade Tips on How to Regulate Crypto
en_content: Gary Gensler and Jay Clayton are aligned on at least one thing: Many types of crypto tokens fall in the agency’s domain.

title: How to Carry Your Covid Health Data on a Smartphone
content: To plan for safe travels and gatherings this holiday season, here are some simple ways to take your Covid-related health data with you.
en_title: How to Carry Your Covid Health Data on a Smartphone
en_content: To plan for safe travels and gatherings this holiday season, here are some simple ways to take your Covid-related health data with you.

title: California regulators fine PG&E $125 million for 2019 fire.
content: Pacific Gas & Electric settled claims that one of its transmission lines caused the Kincade fire.
en_title: California regulators fine PG&E $125 million for 2019 fire.
en_content: Pacific Gas & Electric settled claims that one of its transmission lines caused the Kincade fire.

title: Most Covid Vaccines Will Work as Boosters, Study Suggests
content: In a comparison of seven different brands, researchers found that most shots give a strong boost, even in mix-and-match combinations.
en_title: Most Covid Vaccines Will Work as Boosters, Study Suggests
en_content: In a comparison of seven different brands, researchers found that most shots give a strong boost, even in mix-and-match combinations.

title: Shell pulls out of a U.K. oil field targeted by climate activists.
content: The field, known as Cambo and seen as a bellwether for Britain’s North Sea energy industry, awaits a government decision before it can be developed.
en_title: Shell pulls out of a U.K. oil field targeted by climate activists.
en_content: The field, known as Cambo and seen as a bellwether for Britain’s North Sea energy industry, awaits a government decision before it can be developed.

title: Omicron Is Here. Should You Cancel Your Trip?
content: Most people have become used to making health-risk assessments during the pandemic, but that doesn’t make the decision about whether to travel or cancel easier — especially with a new variant circulating.
en_title: Omicron Is Here. Should You Cancel Your Trip?
en_content: Most people have become used to making health-risk assessments during the pandemic, but that doesn’t make the decision about whether to travel or cancel easier — especially with a new variant circulating.

title: Major news outlets side with Steve Bannon on one part of his legal fight.
content: A coalition of news outlets, which includes The New York Times, said the government’s proposed order to prevent Mr. Bannon from releasing documents to the public would violate the First Amendment.
en_title: Major news outlets side with Steve Bannon on one part of his legal fight.
en_content: A coalition of news outlets, which includes The New York Times, said the government’s proposed order to prevent Mr. Bannon from releasing documents to the public would violate the First Amendment.

title: Janet Yellen says it’s time to stop calling inflation ‘transitory.’
content: The Treasury secretary said the new virus variant could further fuel price increases, but she cautioned it was too soon know.

more_info.byline: By Alan Rappeport and Madeleine Ngo

en_title: Janet Yellen says it’s time to stop calling inflation ‘transitory.’
en_content: The Treasury secretary said the new virus variant could further fuel price increases, but she cautioned it was too soon know.

title: An ad with a vaccinated Santa that drew 5,000 complaints is cleared by British regulators.
content: The commercial, for the supermarket chain Tesco, depicted Santa Claus being cleared to travel.
en_title: An ad with a vaccinated Santa that drew 5,000 complaints is cleared by British regulators.
en_content: The commercial, for the supermarket chain Tesco, depicted Santa Claus being cleared to travel.

title: United Auto Workers reformers prevail in vote to choose president by direct election.
content: Supporters of the change say it will curb corruption. A referendum on the question was required in a consent decree between the union and prosecutors.
en_title: United Auto Workers reformers prevail in vote to choose president by direct election.
en_content: Supporters of the change say it will curb corruption. A referendum on the question was required in a consent decree between the union and prosecutors.

title: BuzzFeed readies public stock offering amid worker protest.
content: BuzzFeed will make its market debut as soon as Monday. As shareholders voted on the deal, some of the media company’s employees staged a work stoppage.

more_info.byline: By Katie Robertson and Peter Eavis

en_title: BuzzFeed readies public stock offering amid worker protest.
en_content: BuzzFeed will make its market debut as soon as Monday. As shareholders voted on the deal, some of the media company’s employees staged a work stoppage.

title: Hundreds of FedEx Packages Dumped in Alabama Ravine, Authorities Say
content: Amid the holiday shopping crush, more than 300 packages were discovered on private property. The driver, who has been identified and questioned by the police, is no longer working for FedEx, the company said.
en_title: Hundreds of FedEx Packages Dumped in Alabama Ravine, Authorities Say
en_content: Amid the holiday shopping crush, more than 300 packages were discovered on private property. The driver, who has been identified and questioned by the police, is no longer working for FedEx, the company said.

title: ‘Where is **?’: Fans in China Elude Censors to Talk About Peng Shuai
content: She is not the first celebrity to be scrubbed from the internet, but her supporters are finding creative ways to voice their frustration.

en_content: She is not the first celebrity to be scrubbed from the internet, but her supporters are finding creative ways to voice their frustration.

title: Twitter and Facebook hit back at Chinese propaganda campaigns.
content: The social media giants removed a large number of accounts that promoted Covid-19 conspiracy theories and undermined reports of human rights abuses.

des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

en_title: Twitter and Facebook hit back at Chinese propaganda campaigns.

title: The economic reality behind a Mississippi anti-abortion argument.
content: The state’s attorney general has said that, since Roe v. Wade, “women have carved their own way to achieving a better balance for success in their professional and personal lives.”
en_title: The economic reality behind a Mississippi anti-abortion argument.

title: OPEC stays on course with plans for a modest increase in oil production.

title: Canada Goose workers vote to unionize in Winnipeg.
content: After a decisive election, about 1,200 employees of the parka maker will be represented by an affiliate of the Service Employees International Union.
en_title: Canada Goose workers vote to unionize in Winnipeg.
en_content: After a decisive election, about 1,200 employees of the parka maker will be represented by an affiliate of the Service Employees International Union.

title: Omicron Prompts Swift Reconsideration of Boosters Among Scientists
content: Many public health experts were opposed to a boosters-for-all approach. The new variant is changing some minds.
en_title: Omicron Prompts Swift Reconsideration of Boosters Among Scientists
en_content: Many public health experts were opposed to a boosters-for-all approach. The new variant is changing some minds.

title: Biden Projects Normalcy and Optimism as Omicron Poses New Threat
content: The president tried to convey holiday cheer as he celebrated Hanukkah and downplayed virus concerns as the variant was detected in California.
en_title: Biden Projects Normalcy and Optimism as Omicron Poses New Threat
en_content: The president tried to convey holiday cheer as he celebrated Hanukkah and downplayed virus concerns as the variant was detected in California.

title: Square, Jack Dorsey’s payments company, changes its name to Block.
content: Mr. Dorsey has in recent years grown more fascinated by cryptocurrencies and the promise of technological decentralization that blockchain technology could allow for.
en_title: Square, Jack Dorsey’s payments company, changes its name to Block.
en_content: Mr. Dorsey has in recent years grown more fascinated by cryptocurrencies and the promise of technological decentralization that blockchain technology could allow for.

title: Inditex, a Spanish fashion giant, will be led by Marta Ortega, the founder’s daughter.
content: Ms. Ortega, 37, will become chairwoman in a generational handoff as the global fashion retailer faces supply chain issues.

title: OPEC Faces Omicron Uncertainty and Rebellious Customers
content: The oil cartel and Russia want to bolster prices after a 10 percent drop last week. But they also need to consider the release of reserves by the U.S. and other countries.

title: A Top Official Says the Fed Will ‘Grapple’ With a Faster Bond-Buying Taper
content: The president of the New York Federal Reserve said Omicron could prolong supply and demand mismatches, causing some inflation pressures to last.

title: Cutting a Banksy Into 10,000 (Digital) Pieces

en_title: Cutting a Banksy Into 10,000 (Digital) Pieces

title: The C.F.P.B. says it will scrutinize banks that rely heavily on overdraft charges.
content: The consumer bureau’s chief says too many banks are hooked on “exploitive junk fees.”
en_title: The C.F.P.B. says it will scrutinize banks that rely heavily on overdraft charges.

title: The global economic recovery has been fast but uneven, a new report shows.
content: The organization predicted the global economy would grow 5.6 percent this year, but said a new virus-related downturn would hurt the United States and Europe differently.

org_facet: Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development

en_title: The global economic recovery has been fast but uneven, a new report shows.
